svg.text: NX6000D 12V Trigger System - Complete Wiring Diagram
1. AV10 trigger → Distribution Box → 12V signal to amp's added jack
2. 12V energizes internal relay coil → relay closes
3. Relay contacts (wired parallel to power button) "press" the button
4. Amp executes native soft-start sequence → NO THUMP
WHY THIS APPROACH: NX6000D produces loud thump when AC power is cut. Internal relay mod triggers amp's native soft-start/stop → eliminates thump.
